meaning: n.塞米勒米斯(古代传说中的亚述女王)
examples: Semiramis claimed that she was immaculately conceived.
Semiramis had all of the parts gathered, except for one part that could not be found.
The Nile-side luxury hotel, the Semiramis InterContinental, has been closed after masked men looted it early on Tuesday, terrifying guests.
Health Ministry spokesman Ahmed Osman said two protesters had been killed in violence outside the Semiramis Intercontinental hotel in downtown Cairo.
